title: apoballis rupestris
intro: Apoballis rupestris, also known as the Rock Apple, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Apoballis rupestris include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve crushing the leaves and roots to make a paste, which can be applied topically or consumed as a decoction to reap its medicinal benefits.
